data.body: PLAN (/rebar-implement). Tree: epic f1fa + 6 stories (S1 843b, S2 0ee8, S3 0525, S4 73f5, S5 3c55, S6 b825) + 7 tasks (S2a 89f9, S2b a9e3, S2c 1ccf; S5a 08e1, S5b ea61, S5c 9a6f, S5d 38be). S7-S9 archived. Topo: S1->S2->{S3,S5}->S4->S6. User authorized FULL autonomy incl. live Gerrit refs/meta/config cutover (JoeOakhartNava admin) + container deploy + SSM (escalate for AWS). Landing: STACKED RELATION CHAIN to refs/for/main. Worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-autolander @ epic/auto-lander-f1fa from origin/main 6244666e5. Held-out TDD for code leaves; operator-attested for live cutover/deploy/SSM.
